title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・『悔しい』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon fails to conquer her rivals and
loses the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She feels frustrated for the first time and is at a
loss for how to deal with the emotion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To dispel her burning, white-hot frustration, she
seeks to win a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, we decide to enter the Japan Cup,
where the powerful Tokai Teio will surely be
racing.
